title: Dungeon Zombies +Fresh Animations
description: A resource pack that adds the zombie and drowned variants and their re-skins from minecraft dungeons into the game! It is required to have sodium, etf, etm and fresh animations installed for this pack to function properly!
body:
A resource pack that adds the zombie and drowned variants and their re-skins from minecraft dungeons into the game!
It is required to have sodium, etf, etm and fresh animations installed for this pack to function properly!

Stay tuned as im planning to add visual effects to certain variants!
